name: Party Cheese Wreath
recipeIngredient: A dash of ground red pepper
Red or orange bell pepper cutouts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cream cheese and shredded cheddar with an electric mixer on medium speed until well blended.
2. Blend in the remaining ingredients except parsley and bell pepper cutouts. Refrigerate several hours or overnight.
3. Place a drinking glass in the center of the serving platter.
4. Drop round tablespoonfuls of the mixture around the glass, just touching the outer edge to form a ring; smooth with a spatula.
5. Remove the glass.
6. Garnish with parsley and bell pepper cutouts.
7. Serve with crackers.
8. Garnish, if desired. Makes 12 servings.
Mini cheese balls: Shape the cream cheese mixture into 1-inch balls. Roll in light rye bread crumbs or dark pumpernickel bread crumbs.
